goals: Discover what unit conversion categories are available
Explore units available for a category relevant to architecture (length or area)
Perform a specific unit conversion needed for a practical task

user_agent_config.personality: Pragmatic and curious. Long-suffering football fan with a passion for architecture who deals with mixed measurement systems in daily life.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Knows basic unit conversions but unfamiliar with specific tool names or APIs. Understands metric and imperial systems from international football and architecture contexts.

end_condition: The user has successfully completed the unit conversion they needed and received the converted value.
